name: JWT Decoder
description: Paste a JSON Web Token to read its header, payload and claims — decoded entirely in your browser. Check expiry, issuer and algorithm without pasting the token into a website you don't control.

inputs.label: Token
inputs.help: Paste a JWT (eyJhbGci…). It's decoded in your browser and never sent anywhere. The signature is not verified — this reads the token, it doesn't trust it.
